name: Ambience
author: OTODESK
description: A high-quality algorithmic reverb VST3 plugin built on a 16-channel Feedback Delay Network (FDN) architecture
changes:
v1.1.0

Bug Fixes:
- PreDelay fix: Fixed PreDelay parameter not being applied to DSP.
- Metallic comb-filter artifact fix at long DecayTime values.
- Preset PRO Mode fix on preset load.

Sound Quality Improvements:
- Chorus-style pitch modulation, 3-stage serial allpass chain, ER->Late transition smoothing.
